name: ~ Ukinami Yuzuha ~
description:
The parasol-wielding, prankster, mischevious member of Waifei's Spook Shack, from the game ZZZ!

Will update this as more info on this smug girl is revealed ~ please review below!!!

Last updated 7/16 - her lore is more set in stone now, added those details to reflect that. As I progress thru her trust events and she shows up more i'll tweak it more. This takes place after the events of 2.1
